words.def: prepare for publication or presentation by correcting, revising, or adapting
words.zh: v. 編輯（edit的過去式和過去分詞）
n. 日常飲食, 議會

words.def: pass from physical life and lose all bodily attributes and functions necessary to sustain life
words.zh: v. 死亡, 消逝（die的過去式和過去分詞）

words.def: a small cube with 1 to 6 spots on the six faces; used in gambling to generate random numbers
words.zh: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄滅, 漠然, 渴望
